标题:
#Couple Edition Top Version Amiri Sunset Skate Series Star Sneakers Casual Sports Shoes

The 2024 Autumn pre-collection introduces the SUNSET SKATE LOW, featuring a new star icon that embodies the spirit of Venice Beach skate culture. The silhouette includes a vulcanized rubber sole, paneled suede upper, leather star applique, wide laces, and signature star perforations on the toe.

✔️ Material: Original custom imported top-grain cowhide  
✔️ Lining: Original custom breathable mesh  
✔️ Outsole: Original custom molded non-slip rubber  
✔️ Size: #35-45 (Women up to 40, Men up to 45; custom orders are final)
